Common.aiHelp: Upload an Excel file or a photo of your scores sheet — AI will read it and import into the system.

Common.aiAuthError: AI service authentication failed. Please contact your administrator.
Common.aiBadFile: AI couldn't read this file. Make sure the photo is clear and the table headers are visible, then try again.
Common.aiUnavailable: AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
Common.beforeUploadPhotoConfirm: Please make sure you are upload picture match with system's table. And Please make sure table has match No, Subjects header.

• Duplicate students within the file will not be inserted
• Students that already exist in the system will be skipped

Teams.title: Team maker
Teams.balanceGenderHint: Spread male and female students evenly across teams.
Teams.idleHint: Pick a split mode and tap Shuffle to form teams.
Teams.noStudents: Add students to the classroom before forming teams.

Timer.title: Activity timer
Timer.subtitle: Countdown for activities or stopwatch for free play.
Timer.stopwatchHint: Counting up — tap Pause to stop.

Points.title: Points & rewards
Points.resetConfirm: Reset all points to zero? This can't be undone.
Points.noStudents: Add students to the classroom before awarding points.

Quiz.title: Quiz time
Quiz.editorHint: One question per line. Use "Question | Answer" for a free-form answer, or "Question | A | B | C | D" for multiple choice. Mark the correct option with a leading * (e.g. *B).
Quiz.editorPlaceholder:
What is 2 + 2? | 4
Capital of Cambodia? | Phnom Penh
Largest planet? | Mars | Earth | *Jupiter | Saturn
Quiz.idleHint: Add questions on the left, then play through them on the right.
Quiz.noCorrectMarked: (no correct option marked — add * before one of the options to mark it)
Quiz.pickStudentHint: Pick a random student to answer.
Quiz.aiSubtitle: Pick a topic and the AI will draft questions for your deck.
Quiz.aiGeneratedCount: Added {count} new question(s) to the deck.

Picker.title: Random student picker
Picker.excludePickedHint: Skip students who have already been chosen.
Picker.durationManualHint: The picker will keep spinning until you press Stop.
Picker.historyEmpty: No picks yet — hit the button to choose someone.
Picker.noStudents: Add students to the classroom before picking.
Picker.allPickedHint: Everyone has been picked. Toggle off the exclude option or clear history to keep going.
Picker.idleHint: Tap the Pick button to randomly choose a student.
Picker.answerTimerHint: Auto-start a countdown when a student is picked.

SignIn.tagline: Manage classrooms, students, subjects, and exam results — all in one place.
SignIn.feature1Desc: Enroll, organize, and follow each learner's progress.
SignIn.feature2Desc: Assign teachers, credits, and grading per subject.
SignIn.feature3Desc: Monthly, semester, and annual reports out of the box.
SignIn.title: Sign in
SignIn.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard.
SignIn.errorPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
SignIn.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

Account.title: My account
Account.subtitle: Update your name, email and avatar.
Account.avatarUrlHint: Paste a public image URL (https://…). Leave blank to keep the current avatar.
Account.uploadInvalidType: Please choose an image file (JPG, PNG, etc.).
Account.uploadTooLarge: Image is too large. Max 5 MB.
Account.pendingUpload: {name} will be uploaded when you save.

Settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences.
Settings.changePasswordHint: Choose a strong password you don't reuse on other sites.
Settings.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
Settings.needUpper: Password must contain an uppercase letter.
Settings.needLower: Password must contain a lowercase letter.
Settings.sameAsCurrent: New password must be different from the current one.
